name: Ali Macofsky
bio: Ali Macofsky is an American stand-up comedian, actress, and writer who established herself in the Los Angeles comedy scene and was an early regular on the Comedy Store's Kill Tony podcast. She hosts the podcast Resting Bitch and made her late-night debut on The Late Show with Stephen Colbert in 2024.

timeline.ev: Featured as a New Face at Just For Laughs
Makes late-night debut on The Late Show with Stephen Colbert

accolades: Early regular on the Kill Tony podcast
